title: LGTM Stack — Service Health Matrix
description: Real-time health matrix for every component in the LGTM observability stack. Instantly identify degraded services, capacity issues, and performance bottlenecks across Grafana, Mimir, Loki, Tempo, and Pyroscope.

options.content:
LGTM Stack — Service Health Matrix

Real-Time Component Status • All Clusters

🟢 Healthy (>99%)  🟡 Degraded (95–99%)  🔴 Critical (<95%)

panels.title: Grafana — Availability
panels.description: Success rate of Grafana HTTP requests (excluding 5xx). Values above 99% indicate healthy operation; below 95% signals critical degradation.

panels.title: Grafana — P95 Latency
panels.description: 95th percentile HTTP request latency for Grafana. Values above 1s indicate significant slowness impacting user experience.

panels.title: Grafana — Request Rate
panels.description: Total HTTP request rate hitting Grafana across all handlers. A sudden drop may indicate connectivity issues or load balancer problems.

panels.title: Grafana — Error Rate
panels.description: Percentage of Grafana HTTP requests returning 5xx status codes. Above 1% warrants investigation; above 5% is critical.

panels.title: Grafana — DB Saturation
panels.description: Ratio of in-use database connections to maximum allowed. Above 80% risks connection exhaustion and query timeouts.

panels.title: Grafana — Active Users
panels.description: Number of users who have been active in Grafana. Tracks platform adoption and concurrent usage patterns.

panels.title: Mimir Write — Availability
panels.description: Success rate of Mimir write (push) path requests. Measures the percentage of ingestion requests that complete without 5xx errors.

panels.title: Mimir Write — P95 Latency
panels.description: 95th percentile latency for Mimir write (push) path. High latency indicates distributor or ingester pressure.

panels.title: Mimir — Active Series
panels.description: Total active time series held in Mimir ingesters. A key capacity metric; growth beyond limits triggers rate-limiting.

panels.title: Mimir Read — Queue Latency P95
panels.description: 95th percentile time queries spend waiting in the query-frontend queue before being picked up by a querier.

panels.title: Mimir — Samples/sec
panels.description: Rate of metric samples received by Mimir distributors. Tracks ingestion throughput and helps forecast capacity needs.

panels.title: Mimir — Error Rate
panels.description: Percentage of all Mimir requests returning 5xx status codes across write and read paths combined.

panels.title: Loki Write — Availability
panels.description: Success rate of Loki write path requests. Measures the percentage of log push requests completing without 5xx errors.

panels.title: Loki Write — P95 Latency
panels.description: 95th percentile latency for Loki log push requests. High values indicate distributor or ingester backpressure.

panels.title: Loki — Active Streams
panels.description: Total number of active log streams held in Loki ingesters. Tracks cardinality and capacity usage.

panels.title: Loki — Lines/sec
panels.description: Rate of log lines received by Loki distributors. Indicates overall log ingestion throughput.

panels.title: Loki — Bytes/sec
panels.description: Rate of log bytes received by Loki distributors. Tracks bandwidth consumption and helps size storage capacity.

panels.title: Loki — Error Rate
panels.description: Percentage of all Loki requests returning 5xx status codes across write and read paths.

panels.title: Tempo Write — Availability
panels.description: Success rate of Tempo trace ingestion requests. Measures the percentage of span push requests completing without 5xx errors.

panels.title: Tempo Write — P95 Latency
panels.description: 95th percentile latency for Tempo trace push requests. High latency signals distributor or ingester pressure.

panels.title: Tempo — Live Traces
panels.description: Total number of live traces currently held in Tempo ingesters before being flushed to backend storage.

panels.title: Tempo — Spans/sec
panels.description: Rate of spans received by Tempo distributors. Tracks overall trace ingestion throughput.

panels.title: Tempo — Bytes/sec
panels.description: Rate of trace bytes received by Tempo distributors. Measures bandwidth consumption of the tracing pipeline.

panels.title: Tempo — Error Rate
panels.description: Percentage of all Tempo requests returning 5xx status codes across write and read paths.

panels.title: Pyroscope Write — Availability
panels.description: Success rate of Pyroscope profile ingestion requests. Measures the percentage of profile push requests completing without 5xx errors.

panels.title: Pyroscope Write — P95 Latency
panels.description: 95th percentile latency for Pyroscope profile push requests. High latency indicates ingestion pipeline pressure.

panels.title: Pyroscope — Active Series
panels.description: Total number of active profile series in Pyroscope ingesters. Tracks profiling cardinality and capacity.

panels.title: Pyroscope — Profiles/sec
panels.description: Rate of profiles received by Pyroscope distributors. Tracks overall profiling data ingestion throughput.

panels.title: Pyroscope — Bytes/sec
panels.description: Rate of profile bytes received by Pyroscope distributors. Measures bandwidth consumption of the profiling pipeline.

panels.title: Pyroscope — Error Rate
panels.description: Percentage of all Pyroscope requests returning 5xx status codes across write and read paths.

panels.title: Component Availability Comparison
panels.description: Side-by-side availability comparison across all LGTM stack components. Instantly spot which component is degraded relative to others.

panels.title: Component P95 Latency Comparison
panels.description: Side-by-side P95 write latency comparison across all LGTM stack components. Quickly identify the slowest component in the pipeline.
